Driver implementations for QSPI communication and voltage monitoring on STM32F412 microcontrollers.


## Files
- **[qspi.c](qspi.c.md)**: Driver implementation for QSPI communication on STM32F4 and STM32F7 microcontrollers, including initialization, indirect read/write, and memory-mapped mode functions.
- **[voltage_monitor.c](voltage_monitor.c.md)**: Voltage monitoring implementation for STM32F412, including ADC initialization and reading functions.
